Recommended: BCHM461 .

Jointly offered with: NFSC427.

Credit Only Granted for. NFSC678K, NFSC498K, NFSC427, or NFSC627. Formerly: NFSC678K.

NFSC630 Nutritional Aspects of Energy Balance (3 Credits)

The prevalence and basic causes of caloric imbalance, along with a wide variety of approaches to weight control.
